example: It will be compulsory for you to participate in a game every Saturday.
All the children will have to maintain decorum in the swimming class.
There will be a specific dress code too.
Otherwise, you will never overcome this fear.
Mami, give me some excuse. I don't want to join swimming classes.
For this you have to practice pranayam, which you were taught in yoga classes.
zh: 調息法（瑜伽中的呼吸控制練習）
ja: プラナヤマ（ヨガの呼吸法）

example: Then an assistant came and taught the kids to tie swim tyre to them.
The teacher asked them to stand in a queue.
Chinky was standing on the edge due to fear. She said, 'I am scared teacher.'
ja: 怖がっている、恐れている

example: You will be sent to participate at the state and national level competition.
ja: 競争、コンペティション

example: From now on, you will have weekly hobby classes.
Swimming is really good for the health. It makes your muscles strong.
Then get to start a teasing, Tinky.
